title: Variant Diversity
query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Variant_Localised) AS variants, COUNT(DISTINCT Species_Localised) AS species FROM ScanOrganic WHERE ScanType = 'Analyse' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {variants} unique biological variant(s) fully analysed across {species} species during the report period. Variants are colour or environment-conditioned expressions of the same species and contribute to the diversity score that serious xenobiologists track.
details.help: Variant_Localised includes colour/environment suffixes. variants drives the title as the diversity headline. species is secondary context.

tagLines: Biological variant catalogue updated. Xenobiology contribution diversity noted in the field report.
Same species, different planet, different colour. Each one counts. You found a lot of new combinations.
Variant hunting is the completionist's game. No map, no guide, just atmosphere tables and patience.
